bird.name: Hispaniolan lizard cuckoo
bird.summary: The Hispaniolan lizard cuckoo (Coccyzus longirostris) is a species of bird in the tribe Phaenicophaeini, subfamily Cuculinae of the cuckoo…

locations.name: Hispaniolan moist forests
locations.summary: The Hispaniolan moist forests are a tropical moist broadleaf forest ecoregion on the island of Hispaniola.

locations.name: Hispaniolan pine forests
locations.summary: The Hispaniolan pine forests are a subtropical coniferous forest ecoregion found on the Caribbean island of Hispaniola,…

relations.subject: Hispaniolan lizard cuckoo
relations.evidence: The species inhabits tropical deciduous and evergreen forests, more open woodland, thickets, mountain slopes with bushes, plantations, and gardens
